Main.renderCrashDesc: A crash has been detected on the rendering side. Click View Log to view the crash log. After ignoring, you can view it in the system settings
Main.remoteRequestContent: User Alex-null is requesting a remote connection to you, do you agree to the connection?
Main.migrateDataDesc: Due to the reconstruction of the IRify function, in order not to affect the use, you need to click OK to migrate the old data. Data migration will not cause any data loss.

FuncDomain.controllerSideDesc: You can remotely control his client through the key shared by the controlled side

RunNodeModal.inputNodeParamsError: Please enter ip/domain, port number, node name
RunNodeModal.runNodeDesc: Running nodes will occupy engine resources. It is recommended to use Yakit moderately when running nodes, otherwise it will cause the node to run tasks slowly. You can run multiple nodes (running on different platforms, or the same platform with different node names).
